text: In this space, I am enveloped by a sense of curiosity and quiet awe. The interplay of light and color hints at innovation, yet the relic-like displays evoke a gentle nostalgia. It feels as though I am walking through a liminal zone between past and future, surrounded by artifacts of thought, invention, and human connection. There is a comforting solitude here, but also an invitation to ponder what unites us across eras.
